steps.title: Eliminate one variable
steps.content:
Multiply the first equation by $7$ so the $x$-terms match.
$$7x+28y=273$$

steps.title: Subtract the equations
steps.content:
Subtract the second equation from the new first equation.
$$(7x+28y)-(7x-20y)=273-(-63)$$
$$48y=336$$

steps.title: Divide to find value
steps.content:
Divide both sides by $48$.
$$y=\frac{336}{48}$$
$$y=7$$ The answer is 7.
